title: Titan T-Tail Soft Fishing Lure 10cm
description: High-grade eco-friendly PVC soft bait with vivid swimming action. Engineered with a deep ribbed body to hold scent longer. Perfect for bass, walleye, and saltwater fishing.

title: Titan Heavy Duty Sports Grip Tape
description: Professional anti-slip, sweat-absorbent grip tape. Offers maximum vibration dampening and elite control for tennis rackets, baseball bats, and hockey sticks.

title: Titan Premium Rubber Basketball No.7
description: Official Size 7 indoor/outdoor rubber basketball. Features an ultra-durable deep-channel rubber cover for superior grip and long-lasting performance on any court surface.
